name: agent402-strands
description: Drop-in Strands Agents (TypeScript) tools for Agent402: turn 1,000+ pay-per-call web tools into Strands tool() instances, with auto-payment (proof-of-work free, USDC via x402 paid). Snaps into AWS Bedrock AgentCore Payments out of the box. Zero deps.
author: Mikey Petrillo (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
